groundingActions.biggestGap: Geography unnamed, environmental details generic, Jaina's internal stack lacked arcane specifics
groundingActions.enrichment: Named King's Road, Eastweald, Scholomance basin. Specified wheat fields, apple/plum orchards, terraced hills. Enriched wagons with canvas sacks, root vegetables, iron-banded trunks. Mastiff, hawthorn hedge. Alchemical chalk with Lordamere Lake scrubbing detail. Jaina's stack enriched with Andorhal, necrotic carrier, phylactery, reanimation rune. Slate chalkboard, mahogany side table, runic formulas. Added leather-creak saddle beat. Named Cult of the Damned, Ner'zhul, King Terenas. Added hoofbeat environmental beat. Enriched plague explanation with necromantic compound, shadow magic, bloodstream. Thalassian leatherwork detail for Cyndia's gear. Kirin Tor sending stone, oak staff butt. Named Darrowshire crossroads with Holy Light shrine. Added recurve bow detail.

groundingActions.enrichment: Named Jandice Barov as illusionist. Shipping manifests, ledger books. Livestock pens. Brass drawers, surgical theatre, operating tables, abomination parts, butcher crates. Added alchemical chalk flashback detail with Kel'Thuzad. Named Scholomance, Kirin Tor visitor. Added hedge-cut lane and orchard shadow environmental beat. Phylactery ritual named. Arcane anchor terminology. Added ash trees for Cyndia's check. Barley fields, beaten copper sunset.

Silver Hand knights, Runestones of Quel'Thalas, Eversong border. Lord Saltheril named. Courser stride detail. Oak-wood smoke specified. Light-sworn priest with soot-stained hem.

groundingActions.biggestGap: Generic sending stone, unnamed Dalaran institutions, thin Antonidas interior
groundingActions.enrichment: Kirin Tor sending stone, mithril filigree, arcane pulse, Violet Citadel. Preliminary scrying report. Ner'zhul named again as orc shaman. Council of Six, political weight. Dormant necromantic compound, hive-mind coordination, Alliance armour. Evocation magic in the field. Royal granaries, guild bakehouses, rune structure. Dalaran geography: oak table, restricted archives, purple sleeves inked at cuff. Teleport to Dalaran, Council of Six, Tirisfal Glades. Flash-freeze grain stores. Mahogany desk, cup of tea. Scrying logs, Violet Guard. Study flashback enriched with academic approval and elegant brilliance.

groundingActions.scene: Scene 5 — Courier + Stratholme planning + final ride
groundingActions.biggestGap: Generic courier, unnamed military units, thin Stratholme map
groundingActions.enrichment: Alliance courier with Lordaeron cloak, draft horse, iron greaves. Broadhead arrow, elven armour. Outer defensive perimeter, Uther the Lightbringer, Silver Hand cavalry, First Legion infantry. Priests of the Light, Last Rites. Captain Falric's infantry. Crown Prince. Relay station. Architectural map of Stratholme from Dalaran geography lessons. Central market, baker's district, warehouse lanes, cobblestone service roads. Royal granaries, guild bakehouses, service gates. Arcane frost, flash-freeze silos, evocation fire. Undead army. Scholomance crypts, Millhaven skirmish. Monastery bell, evening vespers, iron bell. Grid map of Stratholme.

selfAuditNotes: Full pass through all additions against slop-hitlist. No violations found. All proper nouns sourced from materials, plan, story overview, or character files. No lore dumps — all grounding woven through action, dialogue, and Jaina's POV filter. Voice consistency checked against both voice sheets. Grounding spread evenly across all five scenes.
